seoTitle: Hambidge vs Hamley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hambidge and Hamley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hambidge and Hamley.
heading: Hambidge vs Hamley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hambidge, South Australia and Hamley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hambidge has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Hamley (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hambidge or Hamley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hambidge has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Hamley scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hambidge scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Hamley scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hambidge or Hamley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hambidge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
